name: Chili Popcorn Seasoning
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the salt, chili powder, garlic powder, ground cumin, dried onion flakes, and cayenne pepper until well combined.
2. For each half cup of popped corn, use one or two teaspoons of the seasoning mixture.
3. Sprinkle the seasoned popcorn with butter to taste before serving.
